title: tectaria macrosora
intro: Tectaria macrosora, also known as the Large-leaf Tectaria, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tectaria macrosora include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of digestive problems. Tinctures, infusions, and decoctions are among the herbal preparations made from this plant, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
